This page is protected to prevent harmful edits. Contact an administrator if you want to suggest changes to the page.

If you think this page should be unprotected, then use {{unprotect}} on the talk page.

Rings are similar to Necklaces and Amulets. Some of them have a magical effect upon the wearer, but others are only for decoration.

While most Necklaces and Amulets provide their effect in a number of charges, most rings are effective for an amount of time.

Rings[]

Name Arm Weight Attributes Resist. Duration Charges Lvl Vocation Dropped By
Alicorn Ring 0.85 holy magic level +1 fire +4%, earth +4%, energy +4%, ice +4% 400 paladins
  • This item is not dropped by any creatures.

  • This item is not dropped by any creatures.
